_id.description: = product_id from the source sheet (plan B-1)

price_rub.description: must be a number — drives the strict budget filter/sort (plan B-4)

link.description: null for product_004 — that row has no link in the source sheet

main_actives.description: null for product_004 — that row has no main_actives in the source sheet

pH.description: corrupted source column, incl. an Excel date serial for product_004 (plan A-5) — copied as-is, never used as a filter

volume_ml.description: null where the source said 'N/A' instead of a number (plan B-16, force-numeric)

price_per_ml.description: null where the source had a formula error '#VALUE!' (plan B-17, force-numeric)

skintype.description: empty for all 69 products today; future skin-type tags go here (plan B-19, F)

status.description: HOLD — undocumented source column, currently always false (plan B-20)

routine_step.description: derived from category_raw — see plan section D

tier.description: core = daily spine, occasional = treatments (plan A-3, D)

order_index.description: 1-5 for tier=core (sorts the spine), null for tier=occasional (plan B, D)

allergens_norm.description: provisional tokenized allergen list for exclusion filtering (plan A-4, B-51)

concerns_addressed.description: derived from functional_category keyword match — soft signal, never a hard filter (spec H)
